description_long: This is a large, robust wooden storage box with a weathered, industrial appearance. The box is reinforced with visible metal bolts at the corners and along the edges, suggesting durability and strength. One side prominently features a yellow warning sign with black diagonal stripes and bold 'WARNING' text, indicating that the contents may be hazardous or require caution. The wood surface is rough and shows signs of wear, with visible grain, scratches, and some discoloration, giving it a utilitarian, outdoor-ready look. The box appears to be fully enclosed with no visible handles, hinges, or openings, implying a simple, solid construction. Its size and warning label suggest it is intended for secure storage in environments like warehouses, construction sites, or urban utility areas.
description: A large, weathered wooden storage box with metal bolts and a prominent yellow warning sign on one side, designed for secure, industrial use.
description_view_0: The front view shows the yellow warning sign with black stripes and bold 'WARNING' text, along with metal bolts and a rough wooden surface.
description_view_1: This side view displays only the plain wooden surface with metal bolts, lacking any signage or distinguishing marks.
description_view_2: Another plain wooden side with visible bolts and weathering, similar to view 1, with no signage or openings.
description_view_3: A third plain wooden side, showing bolts and wood grain, with no labels or unique features.
